text:
Ilse Langnar was a member of the Survey Corps in the Attack on Titan manga and anime. Other articles with this name include:
Ilse's Notebook - A special chapter of the Attack on Titan manga.
Ilse's Notebook: Notes from a Scout Regiment Member - The first OVA of the Attack on Titan anime.
Ilse Langnar (Junior High Anime) - Ilse's counterpart from the Attack on Titan: Junior High anime.
Ilse's Rage - The 7th chapter of the 5th volume and the 39th chapter overall of the Attack on Titan: Junior High manga, written and illustrated by .
